spanGrp.span: It started in 1975 until 1976, true.
Honestly, I heard from my relatives that when you hid in the mill and there were clashes...
Brother, we are not like this. We were laughed at.
What happened? What happened exactly? How come the Phalangists got all the way in?
The Phalangists were all living together with us.
The Palestinians entered.
It started to be like "someone died there and then someone would die here",
and this stirred up discord.
They came here many times! Look, brother we are all together and we are all Lebanese and we are this and that...
Ha! Traitors, God is the greatest, and he turns out to be a liar, may God curse his religion
They started to enter with the Palestinians, they (the Palestinians) lured them with money
What a bunch of tricky traitors.
"Go back to your land", they kicked them out, but they wouldn't leave, and at the end they left (lit. you.m.pl left).
They made it a sectarian issue. Sometimes they would throw them there, they would target someone to throw him away...
And sometimes here, at yours.
And you would be then just a child, a teen.
Do you think that the geography of our country is worthy of a war?
Just look at the area we are in, look at the mountains behind you.
With every bombing... They would lie to us.
"What happened where?" "In Birbār!" "It happened" And we believe it!
Yes, yes, (these are) some examples of the moments they brought (with them).
Yes, they took us, and they kicked us out completely barefoot, stark naked.
And no one looked at us (cared about us), you would not believe it.
Everyone, your grandfather my grandfather and myself, we were all, it was all in our hands.
Then the youngsters started affiliating with the parties... One would go with the socialists, one would go with Fatah, one would go with...
to secure food, water and a roof over his head (lit. to eat, drink and protect his head).
The Lebanese (civil) War is all a big fat lie.
So the ones to blame are the Palestinians first, and not the socialists.
Yes, the Palestinian (who) entered and even came a million times, (like) the parties, the Phalange and others...
They are really traitors, God is great! If you want to enter (somewhere) peacefully, just like you are doing now ....
And then everything and everyone was lost.
Yes, then everything and everyone was lost, my boy.
We, ʕArab il-Maslax, we are marginalized.
We are still marginalized. Well, we all want to be "the bigger fish in the pond".
